1→# SPEC-1: Ralph Automation Scripts Suite
     2→
     3→> **Location**: `ralph/scripts/`
     4→> **Priority**: P1 (Critical)
     5→> **Source**: ralph-fixes/RALPH_MANUAL.md Section 7, ralph-fixes/RALPH_IMPROVEMENT_PLAN.md Part 4
     6→
     7→---
     8→
     9→## Overview
    10→

    12→
    13→---
    14→
    15→## Scripts to Implement
    16→
    17→### 1. archive-completed.sh
    18→

    20→
    21→**Usage**:
    22→```bash
    23→./ralph/scripts/archive-completed.sh             # Archive completed tasks

    37→

    39→```
    40→ralph/IMPLEMENTATION_ARCHIVE/
    41→└── 2026-01-20/

    53→**Usage**:
    54→```bash
    55→./ralph/scripts/request.sh "Create API documentation"
    56→./ralph/scripts/request.sh --template docs "Application startup"
    57→./ralph/scripts/request.sh --template test "AuthService"
    58→./ralph/scripts/request.sh --template fix "Login timeout bug"
    59→./ralph/scripts/request.sh --template feature "Dark mode toggle"

    86→## Objective

    88→
    89→## Deliverables

    95→- Prerequisites

    97→- Verification steps
    98→- Troubleshooting
    99→
   100→## Acceptance Criteria

   102→- [ ] Can follow docs from scratch without assumed knowledge
   103→
   104→## Completion Signal

   107→
   108→**test Template**:
   109→```markdown
   110→# Immediate Task: Tests - {{TITLE}}
   111→
   112→## Objective
   113→Write comprehensive tests for {{TITLE}}.
   114→
   115→## Deliverables
   116→1. Test file in appropriate `__tests__/` directory
   117→2. All tests passing
   118→
   119→## Requirements
   120→- Unit tests for all public methods
   121→- Edge cases and error conditions
   122→- Integration tests if applicable
   123→

   126→- [ ] Coverage for main functionality
   127→
   128→## Completion Signal
   129→<promise>TESTS_COMPLETE</promise>
   130→```
   131→
   132→**fix Template**:
   133→```markdown
   134→# Immediate Task: Bug Fix - {{TITLE}}
   135→
   136→## Objective
   137→Fix the bug: {{TITLE}}
   138→
   139→## Investigation
   140→1. Reproduce the issue
   141→2. Identify root cause
   142→3. Implement fix
   143→4. Add regression test
   144→

   147→- [ ] Regression test added
   148→- [ ] All existing tests still pass
   149→
   150→## Completion Signal
   151→<promise>FIX_COMPLETE</promise>
   152→```
   153→
   154→**feature Template**:
   155→```markdown
   156→# Immediate Task: Feature - {{TITLE}}
   157→
   158→## Objective
   159→Implement feature: {{TITLE}}
   160→
   161→## Deliverables
   162→1. Feature implementation
   163→2. Tests for the feature
   164→3. Documentation if user-facing
   165→
   166→## Acceptance Criteria
   167→- [ ] Feature works as specified
   168→- [ ] Tests passing
   169→- [ ] No regressions
   170→
   171→## Completion Signal
   172→<promise>FEATURE_COMPLETE</promise>
   173→```
   174→
   175→**Behavior**:
   176→1. Parse arguments for description and template
   177→2. Generate @fix_plan.md from template
   178→3. Write to `ralph/@fix_plan.md`
   179→4. Echo: "Created ralph/@fix_plan.md - Run ./ralph/loop.sh to execute"
   180→
   181→---
   182→
   183→### 3. focus.sh
   184→
   185→**Purpose**: Add/remove session focus signposts in PROMPT_build.md.
   186→
   187→**Usage**:
   188→```bash
   189→./ralph/scripts/focus.sh "Complete Phase 7.2 only"  # Add focus
   190→./ralph/scripts/focus.sh --show                      # Show current focus
   191→./ralph/scripts/focus.sh --remove                    # Remove focus
   192→```
   193→
   194→**Signpost Format** (added to TOP of PROMPT_build.md):
   195→```markdown
   196→## SESSION FOCUS (Remove when complete)
   197→
   198→This session: {{FOCUS_DESCRIPTION}}
   199→
   200→---
   201→```
   202→
   203→**Behavior**:
   204→1. `--show`: Check if signpost exists, display it
   205→2. `--remove`: Remove signpost block from PROMPT_build.md
   206→3. Default: Add signpost to top of PROMPT_build.md
   207→4. Backup original to `.PROMPT_build.md.bak`
   208→
   209→---
   210→
   211→### 4. check-plan-size.sh
   212→
   213→**Purpose**: Validate IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md size, warn if too large.
   214→
   215→**Usage**:
   216→```bash
   217→./ralph/scripts/check-plan-size.sh              # Check with default 400 line limit
   218→./ralph/scripts/check-plan-size.sh --warn-at 300  # Custom warning threshold
   219→./ralph/scripts/check-plan-size.sh --fail         # Exit 1 if exceeded
   220→```
   221→
   222→**Output**:
   223→```
   224→IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md: 234 lines (OK, max: 400)
   225→```
   226→or
   227→```
   228→WARNING: IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md: 520 lines (exceeds 400)
   229→Consider running: ./ralph/scripts/archive-completed.sh
   230→```
   231→
   232→**Exit Codes**:
   233→- 0: Under limit
   234→- 1: Over limit (with --fail flag)
   235→
   236→---
   237→
   238→### 5. refresh-plan.sh
   239→
   240→**Purpose**: Regenerate IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md from specs (disposable plans philosophy).
   241→
   242→**Usage**:
   243→```bash
   244→./ralph/scripts/refresh-plan.sh                  # Full refresh
   245→./ralph/scripts/refresh-plan.sh --keep-learnings # Preserve learnings section
   246→./ralph/scripts/refresh-plan.sh --archive        # Archive current first
   247→```
   248→
   249→**Behavior**:
   250→1. Archive current plan to `IMPLEMENTATION_ARCHIVE/YYYY-MM-DD-pre-refresh.md`
   251→2. Run `./ralph/loop.sh plan 3` to regenerate
   252→3. Report completion
   253→
   254→---
   255→
   256→### 6. check-context.sh
   257→
   258→**Purpose**: Check token budget of key Ralph files before iteration.
   259→
   260→**Usage**:
   261→```bash
   262→./ralph/scripts/check-context.sh
   263→```
   264→
   265→**Checks**:
   266→| File | Max Tokens | Calculation |
   267→|------|------------|-------------|
   268→| IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md | 15,000 | words * 1.3 |
   269→| AGENTS.md | 2,000 | words * 1.3 |
   270→
   271→**Output**:
   272→```
   273→Context Budget Check:
   274→  IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md: ~12,400 tokens (OK, max: 15,000)
   275→  AGENTS.md: ~1,800 tokens (OK, max: 2,000)
   276→```
   277→or
   278→```
   279→WARNING: IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md: ~18,500 tokens (exceeds 15,000)
   280→Consider running: ./ralph/scripts/archive-completed.sh
   281→```
   282→
   283→---
   284→
   285→## Implementation Notes
   286→
   287→1. All scripts must be executable (`chmod +x`)
   288→2. Use `#!/bin/bash` shebang
   289→3. Support `--help` flag with usage information
   290→4. Use consistent logging format: `[INFO]`, `[WARN]`, `[ERROR]`
   291→5. Handle missing files gracefully
   292→6. Create backups before modifying files
   293→
   294→---
   295→
   296→## Acceptance Criteria
   297→
   298→- [ ] All 6 scripts exist in `ralph/scripts/`
   299→- [ ] All scripts are executable
   300→- [ ] All scripts support `--help`
   301→- [ ] `archive-completed.sh` correctly archives and removes completed tasks
   302→- [ ] `request.sh` creates valid @fix_plan.md with all templates
   303→- [ ] `focus.sh` correctly adds/removes signposts
   304→- [ ] `check-plan-size.sh` reports accurate line counts
   305→- [ ] `refresh-plan.sh` archives and regenerates plan
   306→- [ ] `check-context.sh` estimates token counts
   307→

But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.
</system-reminder>

file.content:
# SPEC-1: Ralph Automation Scripts Suite

> **Location**: `ralph/scripts/`
> **Priority**: P1 (Critical)
> **Source**: ralph-fixes/RALPH_MANUAL.md Section 7, ralph-fixes/RALPH_IMPROVEMENT_PLAN.md Part 4

---

## Overview

Create a suite of automation scripts in `ralph/scripts/` to enable quick mid-course corrections and automatic plan maintenance. These scripts are essential for steering Ralph during 24h+ autonomous runs.

---

## Scripts to Implement

### 1. archive-completed.sh

**Purpose**: Archive completed tasks from IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md to reduce file size.

**Usage**:
```bash
./ralph/scripts/archive-completed.sh             # Archive completed tasks
./ralph/scripts/archive-completed.sh --dry-run   # Preview changes
./ralph/scripts/archive-completed.sh --phase 3   # Archive specific phase
./ralph/scripts/archive-completed.sh --all       # Archive everything completed
```

**Behavior**:
1. Read IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md
2. Extract all lines with `[x]` (completed tasks)
3. Extract resolved GAP sections (GAP-X...RESOLVED)
4. Create dated folder: `ralph/IMPLEMENTATION_ARCHIVE/YYYY-MM-DD/`
5. Write `completed-tasks.md` and `resolved-gaps.md` to archive folder
6. Remove archived content from IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md
7. Report: "Archived N tasks, plan reduced from X to Y lines"

**Output Structure**:
```
ralph/IMPLEMENTATION_ARCHIVE/
└── 2026-01-20/
    ├── completed-tasks.md
    ├── resolved-gaps.md
    └── summary.txt
```

---

### 2. request.sh

**Purpose**: Create `ralph/@fix_plan.md` for immediate task injection.

**Usage**:
```bash
./ralph/scripts/request.sh "Create API documentation"
./ralph/scripts/request.sh --template docs "Application startup"
./ralph/scripts/request.sh --template test "AuthService"
./ralph/scripts/request.sh --template fix "Login timeout bug"
./ralph/scripts/request.sh --template feature "Dark mode toggle"
./ralph/scripts/request.sh --priority P1 "Critical security fix"
```

**Templates**:

**Default Template**:
```markdown
# Immediate Task: {{TITLE}}

## Objective
{{DESCRIPTION}}

## Deliverables
1. [Specify deliverable]

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] [Criterion 1]

## Completion Signal
<promise>FIX_COMPLETE</promise>
```

**docs Template**:
```markdown
# Immediate Task: Documentation - {{TITLE}}

## Objective
Create comprehensive documentation for {{TITLE}}.

## Deliverables
1. Documentation file in `docs/` or appropriate location
2. Update `ralph/AGENTS.md` if operational commands involved

## Sections Required
- Overview
- Prerequisites
- Step-by-step instructions
- Verification steps
- Troubleshooting

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Documentation is complete and follows project style
- [ ] Can follow docs from scratch without assumed knowledge

## Completion Signal
<promise>DOCS_COMPLETE</promise>
```

**test Template**:
```markdown
# Immediate Task: Tests - {{TITLE}}

## Objective
Write comprehensive tests for {{TITLE}}.

## Deliverables
1. Test file in appropriate `__tests__/` directory
2. All tests passing

## Requirements
- Unit tests for all public methods
- Edge cases and error conditions
- Integration tests if applicable

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All tests passing with `bun test <path>`
- [ ] Coverage for main functionality

## Completion Signal
<promise>TESTS_COMPLETE</promise>
```

**fix Template**:
```markdown
# Immediate Task: Bug Fix - {{TITLE}}

## Objective
Fix the bug: {{TITLE}}

## Investigation
1. Reproduce the issue
2. Identify root cause
3. Implement fix
4. Add regression test

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Bug is fixed
- [ ] Regression test added
- [ ] All existing tests still pass

## Completion Signal
<promise>FIX_COMPLETE</promise>
```

**feature Template**:
```markdown
# Immediate Task: Feature - {{TITLE}}

## Objective
Implement feature: {{TITLE}}

## Deliverables
1. Feature implementation
2. Tests for the feature
3. Documentation if user-facing

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Feature works as specified
- [ ] Tests passing
- [ ] No regressions

## Completion Signal
<promise>FEATURE_COMPLETE</promise>
```

**Behavior**:
1. Parse arguments for description and template
2. Generate @fix_plan.md from template
3. Write to `ralph/@fix_plan.md`
4. Echo: "Created ralph/@fix_plan.md - Run ./ralph/loop.sh to execute"

---

### 3. focus.sh

**Purpose**: Add/remove session focus signposts in PROMPT_build.md.

**Usage**:
```bash
./ralph/scripts/focus.sh "Complete Phase 7.2 only"  # Add focus
./ralph/scripts/focus.sh --show                      # Show current focus
./ralph/scripts/focus.sh --remove                    # Remove focus
```

**Signpost Format** (added to TOP of PROMPT_build.md):
```markdown
## SESSION FOCUS (Remove when complete)

This session: {{FOCUS_DESCRIPTION}}

---
```

**Behavior**:
1. `--show`: Check if signpost exists, display it
2. `--remove`: Remove signpost block from PROMPT_build.md
3. Default: Add signpost to top of PROMPT_build.md
4. Backup original to `.PROMPT_build.md.bak`

---

### 4. check-plan-size.sh

**Purpose**: Validate IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md size, warn if too large.

**Usage**:
```bash
./ralph/scripts/check-plan-size.sh              # Check with default 400 line limit
./ralph/scripts/check-plan-size.sh --warn-at 300  # Custom warning threshold
./ralph/scripts/check-plan-size.sh --fail         # Exit 1 if exceeded
```

**Output**:
```
IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md: 234 lines (OK, max: 400)
```
or
```
WARNING: IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md: 520 lines (exceeds 400)
Consider running: ./ralph/scripts/archive-completed.sh
```

**Exit Codes**:
- 0: Under limit
- 1: Over limit (with --fail flag)

---

### 5. refresh-plan.sh

**Purpose**: Regenerate IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md from specs (disposable plans philosophy).

**Usage**:
```bash
./ralph/scripts/refresh-plan.sh                  # Full refresh
./ralph/scripts/refresh-plan.sh --keep-learnings # Preserve learnings section
./ralph/scripts/refresh-plan.sh --archive        # Archive current first
```

**Behavior**:
1. Archive current plan to `IMPLEMENTATION_ARCHIVE/YYYY-MM-DD-pre-refresh.md`
2. Run `./ralph/loop.sh plan 3` to regenerate
3. Report completion

---

### 6. check-context.sh

**Purpose**: Check token budget of key Ralph files before iteration.

**Usage**:
```bash
./ralph/scripts/check-context.sh
```

**Checks**:
| File | Max Tokens | Calculation |
|------|------------|-------------|
| IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md | 15,000 | words * 1.3 |
| AGENTS.md | 2,000 | words * 1.3 |

**Output**:
```
Context Budget Check:
  IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md: ~12,400 tokens (OK, max: 15,000)
  AGENTS.md: ~1,800 tokens (OK, max: 2,000)
```
or
```
WARNING: IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md: ~18,500 tokens (exceeds 15,000)
Consider running: ./ralph/scripts/archive-completed.sh
```

---

## Implementation Notes

1. All scripts must be executable (`chmod +x`)
2. Use `#!/bin/bash` shebang
3. Support `--help` flag with usage information
4. Use consistent logging format: `[INFO]`, `[WARN]`, `[ERROR]`
5. Handle missing files gracefully
6. Create backups before modifying files

---

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] All 6 scripts exist in `ralph/scripts/`
- [ ] All scripts are executable
- [ ] All scripts support `--help`
- [ ] `archive-completed.sh` correctly archives and removes completed tasks
- [ ] `request.sh` creates valid @fix_plan.md with all templates
- [ ] `focus.sh` correctly adds/removes signposts
- [ ] `check-plan-size.sh` reports accurate line counts
- [ ] `refresh-plan.sh` archives and regenerates plan
- [ ] `check-context.sh` estimates token counts

content.text:
## refresh-plan.sh Specification

**Purpose**: Regenerate IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md from specs, implementing the "disposable plans philosophy."

**Flags/Arguments**:
- `--keep-learnings`: Preserve the learnings section during regeneration
- `--archive`: Archive the current plan before refresh

**Expected Behavior**:
1. Archive current plan to `IMPLEMENTATION_ARCHIVE/YYYY-MM-DD-pre-refresh.md`
2. Run `./ralph/loop.sh plan 3` to regenerate the plan from specs
3. Report completion

**Exit Codes**:
- 0: Successful regeneration
- (No non-zero codes explicitly specified)
